# Name: # 16MB flash layout: dual 3MB OTA app slots + 3MB SPIFFS (frontend bundle
# overwritten by `pio run -t uploadfs`) + 7MB LittleFS "userfs" for user
# data (spool database etc.) which survives frontend/firmware updates.
# userfs uses subtype 0x83 (raw hex — the ESP-IDF enum lacks `littlefs`)
# so PlatformIO's SPIFFS tooling picks the `spiffs` partition unambiguously.
# Arduino's LittleFS.begin() mounts by partition label regardless of subtype.
